title: Discover health workflow candidates from real-life workflows
summary: Build the first milestone for a Philippines insurance and HMO navigator agent: a canonical PhilHealth, HMO, and major-insurance registry that later skills can use without duplicate entities.
acceptance_criteria: The task starts from a source-grounded workflow-understanding packet rather than generic healthcare assumptions.
The grilling phase identifies Philippines insurance and HMO understanding as the first health workflow family to understand deeply.
The task includes a PRD and implementation issue before registry implementation.

The implementation plan covers source discovery, canonical HMO/insurer registry design, deduplication, provider/product extraction, navigator drilling, comparison, deep-dive workflows, and evaluation gates.
The first build milestone is the canonical HMO/insurance registry before any user-facing navigator workflow.
The registry models PhilHealth first, HMOs second, and major insurance companies third.
The registry validates canonical IDs, entity types, aliases, sources, and duplicate prevention.
The dependency call writes only to the health task's approved artifact area.
The task records dependency provenance for any real-life-workflows skill call.
Human-review and no-medical-advice boundaries remain explicit.

context_snapshot.summary: Continue the health workflow discovery task from Matt grilling. Use the approved real-life-workflows dependency step to create workflow-understanding packets during grilling, then ask one blocking question at a time.

approved_artifacts.approval_note: Approved by operator for dependency-created grilling evidence from real-life-workflow-search; keep as evidence unless later promoted by PRD.
Approved by operator for dependency-created grilling evidence focused on Philippine insurance and HMO workflow understanding.
Approved after operator changed scope from planning-only to building the first canonical registry milestone.
Approved schema for validating the first canonical registry milestone.
Approved deterministic validator for the first canonical registry milestone.
Approved issue artifact for the next vertical slice: product and benefit extraction seed catalog.
Approved seed catalog that normalizes PhilHealth benefits, HMO product surfaces, and insurer health-protection surfaces against the canonical registry.
Approved schema for validating the product and benefit extraction seed catalog.
Approved deterministic validator for the product and benefit extraction seed catalog.

capability_dependencies.purpose: Discover and prepare source-grounded health workflow packet candidates for the primary health task during grilling.

selected_skills.purpose: Search the Real Life Workflows source universe and write workflow-understanding packets for health workflow discovery.
selected_skills.call_boundary: Use only for this health task's approved dependency steps during intake or grilling.

dependency_steps.purpose: Create a broad candidate packet for health workflows so grilling can start from concrete workflow doors and source boundaries.
expected_inputs: healthcare workflow discovery for an agentic engineer
need to learn real health workflows one by one

promotion_rules: Keep the packet as grilling evidence unless a later PRD names it as an official artifact.
Do not promote recommendations into active skills without a later tracked implement phase.
stop_conditions: Stop if the dependency call attempts to write outside projects/health/artifacts/workflow-packets/.
Stop if the dependency call attempts to mutate real-life-workflows tracker or skill files.
Stop if the packet is used as clinical, compliance, eligibility, coverage, or safety advice.

dependency_steps.purpose: Create a candidate packet for Philippine insurance and HMO understanding workflows so grilling can focus on consumer education, coverage navigation, provider/HMO comparison, and claims/reimbursement workflow boundaries.
expected_inputs: Philippines insurance and HMO consumer education
Filipinos need to understand insurance types and HMOs
agentic workflow should explain options, documents, coverage concepts, and human-review boundaries

promotion_rules: Keep the packet as grilling evidence unless a later PRD names it as an official artifact.
Use live public Philippine sources before treating packet recommendations as current market or regulatory facts.
stop_conditions: Stop if the dependency call attempts to write outside projects/health/artifacts/workflow-packets/.
Stop if the dependency call attempts to mutate real-life-workflows tracker or skill files.
Stop if the packet is used as insurance advice, coverage determination, claims decisioning, medical advice, or legal advice.

inputs: query: healthcare workflow discovery clinical referral care coordination billing compliance scheduling pharmacy laboratory insurance public health patient intake

query: Philippines insurance HMO health maintenance organization health insurance claims reimbursement coverage navigation PhilHealth Maxicare Medicard Intellicare Pacific Cross Filipino consumer education

session_log.event: Created after operator approved using real-life-workflows skill calls during health grilling.
Entered Matt grilling with an approved dependency step for real-life-workflow-search.
Ran real-life-workflow-search as a dependency during grilling and wrote projects/health/artifacts/workflow-packets/health-workflow-candidates.md as evidence.
Operator pivoted the first deep-dive target to helping Filipinos understand insurance and HMOs in the Philippines; added a scoped dependency step for a Philippine insurance/HMO workflow packet.
Ran real-life-workflow-search for Philippine insurance and HMO understanding, then checked public sources because Philippine insurance/HMO facts are current and regulated.

Operator clarified that this task should produce a comprehensive implementation plan for the entire Philippines insurance/HMO navigator agent, including canonical source inventory, deduplication, HMO/insurance comparison, deep-dive workflows, and future skills, without building the skills yet.
Operator confirmed the first build milestone should be the canonical HMO/insurance registry before any user-facing navigator work.
Operator changed scope from planning-only to building now, with PhilHealth as the main anchor, HMOs second, and big Philippine insurance companies third.
Moved through PRD and first implementation issue for the canonical registry milestone.
Implemented the first registry slice: PhilHealth anchor, 28 Insurance Commission-listed HMOs, 10 major insurance-company seed entries, schema, and deterministic validator.
Opened the next implementation slice for a registry-linked product and benefit seed catalog covering PhilHealth benefit categories, HMO product surfaces, and insurer health-protection surfaces.
Implemented issue 002 product and benefit seed catalog with 15 product surfaces, 1 HMO regulatory pattern, schema, and deterministic validator.
Completed after the health registry and product-catalog slices were validated and pushed to GitHub in commit 9f966aa.
